2026-05-16T19:17:25.5175359Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-05-16T19:17:25.5175806Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-05-16T19:17:25.5176188Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-05-16T19:17:25.5176505Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-05-16T19:17:25.5176915Z [36;1m[0m

2026-05-16T19:22:12.5308773Z PR created. Here's a summary of what was done:
2026-05-16T19:22:12.5309085Z 
2026-05-16T19:22:12.6670742Z **Changes to `pkg/cbt/cbt.go`:**
2026-05-16T19:22:12.6671281Z 
2026-05-16T19:22:13.6866867Z 1. **Extracted `newResultAndArgs` helper** — the identical boilerplate of creating `MetadataResult`, `collectingEmitter`, and base `iterator.Args` was repeated in all 5 public methods. Now a single method handles it; callers only set their snapshot-specific fields.
2026-05-16T19:22:13.6868255Z 
2026-05-16T19:22:14.6209526Z 2. **Removed debug log statements** — `log.Printf("DEBUG ...")` calls were inconsistently scattered in `GetAllocatedBlocks` and `collectingEmitter` (but not in the other 4 methods). Removed them all and dropped the now-unused `"log"` import.
2026-05-16T19:22:14.6210709Z

2026-05-16T19:22:18.3361611Z   
2026-05-16T19:22:18.3362686Z   1. **Extracted `newResultAndArgs` helper** — the identical boilerplate of creating `MetadataResult`, `collectingEmitter`, and base `iterator.Args` was repeated in all 5 public methods. Now a single method handles it; callers only set their snapshot-specific fields.
2026-05-16T19:22:18.3363648Z

If auto-targeting fails (e.g., for schedule or workflow_dispatch triggers), the tool call will fail with an error.","type":["number","string"]},"pr":{"description":"Alias for item_number when targeting a pull request. Labels [\"automation\" \"improvement\"] will be automatically added. Reviewers [\"kaovilai\"] will be assigned.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"base":{"description":"Target base branch for the pull request. 2026-05-16T19:22:18.5782077Z {"timestamp":"2026-05-16T19:22:09.901026725Z","direction":"OUT","type":"REQUEST","server_id":"safeoutputs","method":"tools/call","payload":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"arguments":{"body":"## Summary\n\nTwo code quality improvements to `pkg/cbt/cbt.go`:\n\n### 1. Extract `newResultAndArgs` helper\n\nAll five public CBT methods (`GetAllocatedBlocks`, `GetChangedBlocks`, `GetChangedBlocksByID`, `GetAllocatedBlocksWithOptions`, `GetChangedBlocksWithOptions`) repeated the same boilerplate:\n\n```go\nresult := \u0026MetadataResult{}\nemitter := \u0026collectingEmitter{result: result}\nargs := iterator.Args{\n    Clients:     c.clients,\n    Emitter:     emitter,\n    Namespace:   c.namespace,\n    SANamespace: c.saNamespace,\n    SAName:      c.saName,\n}\n```\n\nThis is now extracted into `(*Client).newResultAndArgs()`, which each method calls before setting only its snapshot-specific fields (`SnapshotName`, `PrevSnapshotName`, `PrevSnapshotID`, `StartingOffset`, `MaxResults`).\n\n### 2. Remove debug log statements\n\n- `GetAllocatedBlocks` had two `log.Printf(\"DEBUG ...\")` calls inconsistently added during development.\n- `collectingEmitter.SnapshotMetadataIteratorRecord` and `SnapshotMetadataIteratorDone` each had a `log.Printf(\"DEBUG ...\")`.\n- None of the other four public methods had any debug logging.\n\nThese are removed, along with the now-unused `\"log\"` import. The `SnapshotMetadataIteratorDone` parameter is now blank (`_ int`) since it had nothing to do.\n\n**Result:** -39 lines, no behavior change.","branch":"improve/cbt-code-quality","title":"pkg/cbt: reduce duplication with newResultAndArgs helper, remove debug logs"},"name":"create_pull_request"}}}
